transcript.text: Alice, thank you for sending everything up.
I've been receiving a ton of notifications from you.
It was great having some rest.
We're going to focus mainly on the onboarding process and everything that you're going to focus on today and the whole of this week.
And then after the session, maybe you can ask me any questions that you need to know about anything or if you need help with anything, you can ask me.
support engineering, the engineering team, and the operations team.
I've been doing engineering for the last, I think, eight years now.
Last year, I took it free.
I quit my last job and started started learning, like, to.
Fly planes and got into like go-karting and stuff.
And yeah, I'm now super excited to be here and to work on growthx.
So I'm going to share my screen and let me know if you can see it.
So I saw you already started working on their projects.
So I guess you already have access to Notion as well, right?
So when you search for the handbook in Notion, this is it.
In the onboarding section, there's the onboarding resources right here.
And so I'm going to click on the company-wide onboarding.
This is the same thing like the one you saw in Notion.
So these are the things that you're going to focus on today.
And I see you already started working on them.
So do you have any questions for day one?
Because you already started working on them.
No, I got, I think, almost everything done.
What I'm missing is the call with my manager and then getting to know my onboarding page.
Apart from that, I think I'm done.
What I'm doing right now is I found a page here in Notion.
No, I think it was in Linear.
It was a team called All Onboarding, which had a link to a Notion page with a bunch of videos, which are, I think, are like recordings of conferences or stuff Marcel gave at some point.
I don't know if I should be doing something else instead.
And do you have a call with Daniel scheduled today afternoon?
Yeah, and he's going to assign you an onboarding badge as well.
So the other things you're going to focus on during this week, just take your time and go through everything, and then if you have any question, you can ask me.
So I'm going to take you through the time of policy, and at growthx, there's no limit, you can take as much time off as you want.
And let's say around 20 to 30 days in the year.
So what you have to do, you don't need to seek approval, you can just block your calendar.
For example, let me show you.
As you can see, Bridget is out of office today, that's why she hasn't joined us.
So you just create a calendar event, and then you add your team like this.
So it's like Nicolas out of office, and then you add your team members.
Try and and give at least...

enough time for notice to your team and that's just it so you can take any time including your country holidays any vacation time you just go and schedule it on your calendar and you add your team members do you have any question nope all good okay um let's go back so um you'll read about this this is about the company these are some documents that Marcel has been writing over the past few months about the company the pitch desk that he um the pitch desk the pitch deck that he used to gain the series one and then the code of conduct employee and then we also have an employee referral program you can refer your friends and then you'll earn so for engineering roles you'll get 10,000 and then nine
Engineering roles, get $5,000 as long as the person stays in the company for at least six months to make sure that they're the right fit.
Yeah, so you'll watch the company onboarding boot camp.
And you'll have a call with Marcel, the CEO, and Kyle on Thursday as well.
So since you started working on this, so you have to attend, which you've done that already.
And then one on one, your onboarding buddy with Daniel later on.
And then read the time of policy that I've just showed you.
And then every other thing you can do within the week.
And that's it for the onboarding.
Everything that you need to focus on.
I'm going to be helping with any, if you need access to any tools, you can just ping me in Slack and then you let me know.
Oh, actually, now you mentioned that there is one thing I forgot about, but I now have access so forget it.
No, what I was going to say is on the 1Password setup task, it said to make sure I have access to, like, the shared vaults.
I didn't initially, but now I'm seeing I do have to.
And you also need to have access to a team match email.
There are employee vaults, internal, and then the team.
Can you try logging in right now?
And let me know if you have, if you run into any issue.
sure if I'll So I'll see you later.
What's the name of the thing again?
In one password you'll open the internal vaults.
So it's called, it's an email, it's called team at growthxclubs.com.
Yeah, so I should try to log into this.
Yeah, so you log into that because that's the email that we use for logging into almost all of our tools that we use.
So you need access to that.
And let me know if you have any issue logging into that.
Oh, it's asking me to open the Gmail app on iPod, so.
Okay, so click on try another one.
What are the options that you see on your site?
I pressed the Google authentication app.
Okay, so if you need access to any tool, there's a Slack channel called IT and tools.
I think I added you to that already.
Could you please confirm IT and tools?
Yeah, so if you need access to anything, you can just go over to that channel and say whatever you need help with, and then you can CC me, and I'll add you to any tools that you need.
Because we always host a bi-weekly all-hands.
So we'll do an introduction that day.
So you'll just introduce yourself before the team, say where you are, what are your interests, and any fun fact about you, one fun fact.
Yeah, so that you're not part of God here.
Do you have any questions for me?

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Nicolas Castellanos on his first day at GrowthX, covering key processes and resources.](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Nicolas has already completed most Day 1 onboarding tasks, including accessing Notion and Linear](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [GrowthX has a flexible time-off policy (20-30 days/year), requiring calendar blocking and team notification](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Nicolas needs to watch onboarding videos, attend scheduled calls, and familiarize himself with company documents](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [IT access and tool requests should go through the "IT and tools" Slack channel, with Alice as support](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)

## Topics

### Introduction and Background

  - [Alice: Executive assistant based in Kenya, supporting engineering and operations teams](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Nicolas: Engineer from Uruguay with 8 years experience, took a year off for personal pursuits (flying, go-karting)](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Nicolas expressed excitement about joining GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)

### Onboarding Resources and Progress

  - [Handbook and onboarding resources available in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Nicolas has completed most Day 1 tasks](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Remaining: Call with manager, getting to know onboarding page](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [Nicolas currently watching recorded conferences/talks by Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)

### Time-Off Policy

  - [No strict limit, suggested 20-30 days per year](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [No approval needed, just calendar blocking](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Add team members to calendar event (e.g., "Nicolas out of office")](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Provide adequate notice to team members](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)

### Company Documents and Programs

  - [Recent company documents written by Marcel available for review](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Series A pitch deck accessible](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Employee referral program: $10k for engineering roles, $5k for non-engineering (after 6-month retention)](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Scheduled Onboarding Activities

  - [Company onboarding bootcamp video by Daniel (in Linear)](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [1:1 with onboarding buddy (Daniel) scheduled for later](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Call with CEO Marcel and Kyle on Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Bi-weekly all-hands meeting: Nicolas to introduce himself (location, interests, fun fact)](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)

### IT Access and Tools

  - Nicolas to use <team@growthxclubs.com> for logging into most tools
  - [1Password access granted, including shared vaults](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - ["IT and tools" Slack channel for requesting access to additional tools](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Watch company onboarding bootcamp video in Linear](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [Attend 1:1 with Daniel (onboarding buddy)](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Review time-off policy details](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [Complete remaining onboarding tasks throughout the week](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [Prepare introduction for upcoming all-hands meeting](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Use "IT and tools" Slack channel for any access needs, CC'ing Alice](https://fathom.video/share/knr1znc-coBfRdaXzWd9RWn1y6XKyCKG?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)

action_items.description: Watch company onboarding bootcamp recording by Daniel in Linear
Complete remaining onboarding tasks within the week (read time off policy, employee referral program, company documents)
Prepare brief self-intro for bi-weekly all-hands (location, interests, 1 fun fact)
